generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment of thermal incubator system for precise temperature control"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor connected via 1-wire bus for thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureReadingDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureReadingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from physical thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureReadingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator, SimulationEngine
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design model representing physical dimensions of thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model formulated via differential equations for thermal behavior of incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, StateEstimator
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for adjusting model parameters using non-linear least squares solver and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Sensor network for real-time temperature data collection via 1-wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring system for safety checks and operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm analyzing sensor data for anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator using sensor data and analytical models to infer system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizer for adjusting operational parameters to achieve optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine leveraging differential equations for dynamic system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller for automated adjustment of physical twin parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of thermal behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational parameters for energy efficiency and stability"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated control of physical twin parameters via supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustPhysicalTwinAction
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system safety based on real-time sensor data"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies or faults in thermal incubator operation"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the thermal system using model and sensor data"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal parameter settings for efficient thermal control"
]

instance AdjustPhysicalTwinAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of incubator parameters to maintain desired thermal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AlertHumanOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notification to human operator for critical safety violations requiring intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller on the Raspberry Pi listens to the RabbitMQ server for commands to control the fan and heatbed. Command types include fan and heatbed control instructions. Message formats and validation mechanisms are not explicitly detailed. Feedback systems and command execution confirmation details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates calibration algorithms to update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models with real-time sensor data, monitoring systems to evaluate system safety and optimality, and human or algorithmic interventions for Physical Twin adjustments when violations are detected, forming a framework that combines modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses a RabbitMQ server for message brokering and a 1-wire bus for sensor connectivity, supporting multiple sensors on a single GPIO. Network topology consists of a Raspberry Pi hosting RabbitMQ connected to sensors via 1-wire bus. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The RabbitMQ server is deployed on the Raspberry Pi itself, indicating edge computing hosting. Computational and storage requirements are minimal for the Raspberry Pi. Scalability mechanisms and availability/reliability assurances are not detailed in the document."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain a safe state, and monitors check whether the system is performing safely and optimally."
]
